channel.title: ASR Microelectronics Co., Ltd. — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by ASR Microelectronics Co., Ltd. (asr).

item.title: CVE-2026-42800 · 7.4 HIGH — Deference after null check in ims_client sip
item.description: NULL pointer dereference vulnerability in ASR1903 in ASR Lapwing_Linux on Linux (ims_client modules) allows Pointer Manipulation. This vulnerability is associated with program files sip/utils/src/sipuri.c.

item.title: CVE-2026-42799 · 7.4 HIGH — Out-of-bounds read in ulp
item.description: Out-of-bounds read vulnerability in ASR Kestrel (nr_fw modules) allows Overflow Buffers. This vulnerability is associated with program files Code/Nr/nr_fw/RA/src/NrPwrCtrl.C. This issue affects Kestrel: before 2026/02/10.

item.title: CVE-2025-13735 · 7.4 HIGH — Out-of-bounds Read in nr flc
item.description: Out-of-bounds Read vulnerability in ASR1903、ASR3901 in ASR Lapwing_Linux on Linux (nr_fw modules). This vulnerability is associated with program files Code/nr_fw/DLP/src/NrCgi.C. This issue affects Lapwing_Linux: before 2025/11/26.

item.title: CVE-2025-49483 · 5.4 MEDIUM — Resource leaks in tr069
item.description: Improper Resource Shutdown or Release vulnerability in ASR180x 、ASR190x in tr069 modules allows Resource Leak Exposure. This vulnerability is associated with program files tr069/tr069_uci.c. This issue affects Falcon_Linux、Kestrel、Lapwing_Linux: befo…

item.title: CVE-2025-49482 · 5.4 MEDIUM — Resource leaks in tr069
item.description: Improper Resource Shutdown or Release vulnerability in ASR180x 、ASR190x in tr069 modules allows Resource Leak Exposure. This vulnerability is associated with program files tr069/tr098.c. This issue affects Falcon_Linux、Kestrel、Lapwing_Linux: before v…

item.title: CVE-2025-49481 · 5.4 MEDIUM — Resource leaks in router
item.description: Improper Resource Shutdown or Release vulnerability in ASR180x 、ASR190x in router modules allows Resource Leak Exposure. This vulnerability is associated with program files router/phonebook/pbwork-queue.C. This issue affects Falcon_Linux、Kestrel、Lapw…

item.title: CVE-2025-49480 · 7.4 HIGH — Out-of-bounds access in lte-telephony
item.description: Out-of-bounds access in ASR180x 、ASR190x in lte-telephony, This vulnerability is associated with program files apps/lzma/src/LzmaEnc.c. This issue affects Falcon_Linux、Kestrel、Lapwing_Linux: before v1536.

item.title: CVE-2025-49488 · 5.4 MEDIUM — Resource leaks in router
item.description: Improper Resource Shutdown or Release vulnerability in ASR180x 、ASR190x in router components allows Resource Leak Exposure. This vulnerability is associated with program files router/phonebook/pb.c. This issue affects Falcon_Linux、Kestrel、Lapwing_Lin…

item.title: CVE-2025-49492 · 7.4 HIGH — Out-of-bounds write in lte-telephony
item.description: Out-of-bounds write in ASR180x in lte-telephony, May cause a buffer underrun. This vulnerability is associated with program files apps/atcmd_server/src/dev_api.C. This issue affects Falcon_Linux、Kestrel、Lapwing_Linux: before v1536.

item.title: CVE-2025-49491 · 5.4 MEDIUM — Resource leaks in traffic_stat
item.description: Improper Resource Shutdown or Release vulnerability in ASR Falcon_Linux、Kestrel、Lapwing_Linux on Linux (traffic_stat modules) allows Resource Leak Exposure. This vulnerability is associated with program files traffic_stat/traffic_service/traffic_serv…

item.title: CVE-2025-49490 · 5.4 MEDIUM — Resource leaks in router
item.description: Resource leak vulnerability in ASR180x in router allows Resource Leak Exposure. This vulnerability is associated with program files router/sms/sms.c. This issue affects Falcon_Linux、Kestrel、Lapwing_Linux: before v1536.

item.title: CVE-2025-49489 · 5.4 MEDIUM — Resource leaks in cm
item.description: Improper Resource Shutdown or Release vulnerability in ASR Falcon_Linux、Kestrel、Lapwing_Linux on Linux (con_mgr components) allows Resource Leak Exposure. This vulnerability is associated with program files con_mgr/dialer_task.C. This issue affects F…

item.title: CVE-2025-5072 · 5.4 MEDIUM — Resource leaks in cm
item.description: Resource leak vulnerability in ASR180x、ASR190x in con_mgr allows Resource Leak Exposure.This issue affects Falcon_Linux、Kestrel、Lapwing_Linux: before v1536.

item.title: CVE-2024-32625 · 5.8 MEDIUM — Uninitialized scalar field
item.description: In OffloadAMRWriter, a scalar field is not initialized so will contain an arbitrary value left over from earlier computations

item.title: CVE-2024-32634 · 6.1 MEDIUM — Logically dead code
item.description: In huge memory get unmapped area check, code can never be reached because of a logical contradiction.

item.title: CVE-2024-32633 · 4 MEDIUM — Unsigned compared against 0
item.description: An unsigned value can never be negative, so eMMC full disk test will always evaluate the same way.

item.title: CVE-2024-32632 · 6.6 MEDIUM — Printf arg type mismatch in ATCMD
item.description: A value in ATCMD will be misinterpreted by printf, causing incorrect output and possibly out-of-bounds memory access

item.title: CVE-2024-32631 · 7.2 HIGH — Out-of-bounds read in telephony
item.description: Out-of-Bounds read in ciCCIOTOPT in ASR180X will cause incorrect computations.

item.title: CVE-2023-49701 · 7.2 HIGH — Out-of-bounds access a buffer in SIM management
item.description: Memory Corruption in SIM management while USIMPhase2init

item.title: CVE-2023-49700 · 6.7 MEDIUM — Buffer Copy Without Checking size of input in IMS
item.description: Security best practices violations, a string operation in Streamingmedia will write past the end of fixed-size destination buffer if the source buffer is too large.

item.title: CVE-2023-49699 · 6.7 MEDIUM — Out-of-bounds access a buffer in IMS
item.description: Memory Corruption in IMS while calling VoLTE Streamingmedia Interface
